description_long: This house features a rectangular, two-section layout with a flat roof and a mix of stone-textured and plain exterior walls. The main section has several small, rectangular windows with wooden shutters and a single wooden door, while the secondary section is slightly set back and has fewer openings. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, some with striped wallpaper and others with plain finishes, and includes visible furnishings such as a bed and kitchen fixtures. The exterior stonework gives the house a rustic, utilitarian appearance, while the flat roof and simple geometry suggest a modern or minimalist design influence. The house appears to be a single-story structure with a clear separation between living and utility spaces. The overall design is functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on practicality.
description: A single-story, flat-roofed house with stone-textured walls, small wooden windows and doors, and a simple, functional layout divided into multiple rooms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with three small windows, a wooden door, and a clear view into the interior rooms with striped and dark walls.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the set-back secondary section, additional windows, and a glimpse of interior furnishings like a bed and kitchen fixtures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall with a single window and the flat roof extending over the secondary section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the interior bedroom with a bed, striped wallpaper, and the overall division between the two main sections.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with no porch or decorative elements, flush with the exterior wall
